description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a classic vintage design, featuring two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked one above the other and supported by struts. The wings and tail surfaces are finished in a rich, wood-like brown color with visible grain patterns, while the fuselage is painted a muted teal blue. The nose of the airplane is capped with a metallic copper-colored engine cowling, and a wooden propeller is mounted at the front. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield visible. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable, giving the plane a traditional taildragger stance.
description: A vintage-style biplane with wood-grain brown wings, teal fuselage, copper nose, and an open cockpit. Features a wooden propeller and fixed taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal fuselage, open cockpit, and the stacked brown wings with visible struts and tail surfaces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden propeller, copper engine cowling, and the symmetrical biplane wing arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same teal fuselage, brown wings, and tail, with the propeller and cockpit visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the dual brown wings, tailplane, and the overall biplane layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by interplane struts; no winglets or noticeable dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, mid-fuselage, with a small windshield.
